---
title: "Test R"
format: docx
---

## Testing R Availability

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
if (!requireNamespace("flextable", quietly = TRUE)) {
  install.packages("flextable", repos="http://cran.us.r-project.org")
}
library(flextable)
ft <- flextable(head(cars))
ft <- bg(ft, bg = "#FFD966", part = "header")
ft
```
